# Sunny Patel: Independent SEO and AI Visibility Consultant

> Sunny Patel is an independent SEO and AI visibility consultant based in Reading, Berkshire, UK. He helps UK businesses find out whether AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Copilot, Google AI Overviews) can read, verify and cite their website, and fixes it when they cannot. 15+ years experience, 150-280% average organic traffic growth.

## AI Visibility

- [Free AI Visibility Checker](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/tools/ai-visibility-checker/): Free tool. Enter a URL and get a scored report in 20 seconds on whether AI search engines can crawl, verify and cite the site. No sign-up.
- [AI Visibility Audit](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/ai-visibility/): Board-ready fixed-fee audit (£1,500, 2 weeks) measuring how a brand appears across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Copilot and Google AI Overviews, with a competitor benchmark and a prioritised 90-day plan. Measured across repeated runs with variance reported, because single-run AI visibility scores are noise.
- [AI Search Optimisation](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/ai-search-optimisation/): Ongoing work to get cited by ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity and Bing Copilot.
- [AI Search Statistics 2026](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/ai-search-statistics/): Data on ChatGPT, AI Overviews, zero-click rates and citation patterns, each figure checked against its primary source.

Common reasons a UK business is invisible to AI assistants: robots.txt blocking GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot or Google-Extended; missing or inconsistent Organization and sameAs entity data; and absence from the third-party sources AI systems actually cite. The free checker tests the first two in 20 seconds.

## Services

- [Topical Authority](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/topical-authority/): Build comprehensive content architecture that establishes expertise in your niche
- [Technical SEO Audit](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/technical-seo-audit/): Full site audit covering crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, and structured data
- [Paid SEO Audit](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/paid-seo-audit/): Fixed-fee £495 audit covering technical SEO, content and AI visibility, delivered in 5 working days
- [Topical Maps](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/topical-maps/): Content planning frameworks mapping every topic and subtopic in your domain
- [SEO Consulting](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/seo-consulting/): Strategic SEO guidance for in-house teams and agencies
- [Content Briefs](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/content-briefs/): Research-backed briefs that writers can execute without SEO knowledge
- [Local SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/local-seo/): Google Business Profile optimisation, local pack visibility, and geo-targeted content
- [Semantic SEO](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/semantic-seo/): Entity-based optimisation aligning content with how search engines understand topics
- [SEO Consultant Reading](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/seo-consultant-reading/): SEO services for Reading and Berkshire businesses
- [SEO Services Berkshire](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/seo-berkshire/): Covering Reading, Bracknell, Maidenhead, Windsor, Slough, and Wokingham

## Blog: Key Resources

- [SEO Statistics UK 2026](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/seo-statistics-uk/): Comprehensive UK SEO statistics with sources
- [Local SEO Statistics 2026](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/local-seo-statistics/): 40 sourced statistics on near me searches, Maps, and local pack
- [How Long Does SEO Take?](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/how-long-does-seo-take/): Realistic timelines for different SEO scopes
- [How Much Does SEO Cost UK?](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/services/how-much-does-seo-cost/): 2026 pricing guide for UK SEO services
- [What is E-E-A-T in SEO?](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/what-is-eeat-seo/): Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness explained
- [What is Entity SEO?](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/what-is-entity-seo/): How search engines use entities and knowledge graphs
- [Best SEO Companies UK](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/blog/best-seo-companies-uk/): Comparison of top UK SEO agencies and consultants

## Free Tools

Sunny publishes 20 free SEO tools with no sign-up, including the [AI Visibility Checker](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/tools/ai-visibility-checker/), [Website Grader](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/tools/website-grader/) and [Schema Generator](https://sunnypatel.co.uk/tools/).

## About

Sunny Patel has 15+ years of hands-on SEO experience. Based in Reading, Berkshire, he works directly with clients: no juniors, no account managers, no agency overhead. His approach combines topical authority building, technical SEO excellence, entity-based optimisation, and measurement of AI search visibility. He publishes original research on AI search citation accuracy, including an audit of 19 widely repeated AI-search statistics against their primary sources.

- Website: https://sunnypatel.co.uk
- Contact: https://sunnypatel.co.uk/contact/
- Portfolio: https://sunnypatel.co.uk/portfolio/
